hero.art_prompt: Rohan, an 18 year old Indian boy, confident and happy studying rising financial charts on a laptop, smart-casual shirt, modern home, aspirational business mood.

panels.narration: Rohan followed the markets every single day.
panels.dialogue: Numbers just make sense to me.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan, 18, in a smart-casual shirt happily reading market and finance news on a laptop and phone at home, curious and engaged, modern tidy room.

panels.narration: But a finance career needed a real degree.
panels.dialogue: How do I turn this into a job?
panels.img_prompt: Rohan looking thoughtful, wondering how to build a finance career, a laptop with charts open in front of him, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a BBA in Finance, online.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing a BBA in Finance, warm hopeful glow, modern home.

panels.narration: He enrolled and began mastering the numbers.
panels.img_prompt: Rohan confidently starting his first finance lesson on a laptop, notebook and calculator beside him, focused and happy, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: Why A BBA In Finance
points: Learn the real craft: accounting, investments, financial modelling and analysis.
Apply real AI finance tools from your very first semester.
Just ₹45,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ recognised degree employers trust.
